## 5. Cumulative Flow Diagram

Insert Mermaid output from `flow_metrics.py --format mermaid`:

```mermaid
xychart-beta
    title "Cumulative Flow"
    x-axis [date1, date2, ...]
    y-axis "Items" 0 --> 100
    line [Backlog values]
    line [Ready values]
    line [In Progress values]
    line [In Review values]
    line [Done values]
```

---

## 7. Caveats

- Flow metrics rely on accurate, real-time status updates. Verify with the team that the board reflects actual work state.
- Cycle time is reported as a team-level metric. Do not use this data for individual performance ranking.
- Trends are more meaningful than snapshots; treat single-period changes as noise unless sustained over 3+ periods.
